nasb.text: “Take Aaron and his sons with him, and the garments and the anointing oil and the bull of the sin offering, and the two rams and the basket of unleavened bread,

esv.text: “Take Aaron and his sons with him, and the garments and the anointing oil and the bull of the sin offering and the two rams and the basket of unleavened bread.

cnv.text: “你要把亞倫和他的兒子，連同聖衣、膏油、贖罪祭的一頭公牛、兩隻公綿羊，一籃無酵餅都帶來，

ccb.text: “你把亚伦父子们带来，也要带圣衣、膏油、一头作赎罪祭的公牛、两只公绵羊和一篮无酵饼，
